experienceModes.name: Beginner
experienceModes.description: Softer pressure, extra guidance, and forgiving event flow.

experienceModes.name: Standard
experienceModes.description: Balanced 48-week flow with normal pressure and mixed event pacing.

experienceModes.name: Elite
experienceModes.description: Advanced pressure, consequence chains, stronger tradeoffs, and required monthly reflection.
